spec_match.rationale: The page now covers connected UDP plus bound multicast receive setup using localAddress/localPort, multicastAllowAddressSharing, and multicastController.joinGroup().

interactive.rationale: Connected UDP, mDNS/SSDP multicast presets, multicast bind attempt, invalid group validation, and clear-log controls all update live readouts.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature card and lede now promise connected UDP and bound multicast probes, matching the UI.

edge_cases.rationale: The page surfaces unsupported/non-IWA fallback, missing direct-sockets-multicast policy fallback, invalid unicast group validation, and mDNS/SSDP multicast targets.

summary: MCP evidence: Chrome 148.0.0.0 loaded http://localhost:3000/v131/direct-sockets-api/udp-socket/. Clicking probe connected UDP logged secure=true, scheme=http:, direct-sockets=not listed, local-network=allowed, then the honest UDPSocket undefined fallback. The SSDP preset changed the multicast target to 239.255.255.250:1900; clicking probe multicast bind logged the bound UDPSocket options and direct-sockets/direct-sockets-multicast policy preflight before the non-IWA fallback. The invalid unicast preset changed the status to check inputs and clicking the multicast probe stopped with not a multicast group: 10.0.0.5. Clear log emptied the log. Console had no messages, network requests were 200/204 only, and http://localhost:3000/v131/direct-sockets-api/conformance/ reported 5/5 pass.
